markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 394. Regul. of Outdoor Signs on Rural Roads
##### § 394.027 — Denial of Permit; Appeal

The commission may create a process by which an applicant may appeal a denial of a permit under this subchapter.

*Added by Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1345 (S.B.1420), Sec. 49(a), eff. September 1, 2011.*

subsections.text: The commission may create a process by which an applicant may appeal a denial of a permit under this subchapter.
